title: Macro Poverty Outlook
body: Macro Poverty Outlook Country-by-country analysis and projections for the developing world Overview The Macro Poverty Outlook (MPO) analyzes macroeconomic and poverty developments in 150 developing countries. The report is released twice annually for the Spring and Annual Meetings of the World Bank and the International Monetary Fund. The MPO consists of individual country notes that provide an overview of recent developments, forecasts of major macroeconomic variables and poverty during 2026-2028, and a discussion of critical challenges for economic growth, macroeconomic stability, and poverty reduction moving forward. DOWNLOAD Spring Meetings 2026 DOWNLOAD Spring Meetings 2026 By Region East Asia and Pacific 23 country MPOs + 16 country datasheets Europe and Central Asia 23 country MPOs + 23 country datasheets Latin America and the Caribbean 29 country MPOs + 29 country datasheets Middle East, North Africa, Afghanistan, and Pakistan 21 country MPOs + 19 country datasheets South Asia 6 country MPOs + 6 country datasheets Sub-Saharan Africa 48 country MPOs + 48 country datasheets Data Dashboard The interactive dashboard allows data from the revised MPO forecasts to be visualized, compared across countries, and downloaded.
